title: Wands of Utility
description: A magic mod that adds some useful wands to make you more efficient.
body:
![Wands of Utility cover image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccaa960843537a2f75b6a7354c858ae0b3dd47f9.png)

# About
- Wands of Utility (WoU) is a magic mod looking to make you more efficient. The main resource of this mod is... **Lapis!**
- **REQUIRES [**PATCHOULI**](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) TO BE INSTALLED**

# Features
- It adds 7 Unique Wands you can choose from
- An In-Game Guide Book provided by Patchouli
- Some new advancements
- A new powerful resource
- Some useful charms
- And More!

# How to get started

### Craft the **Guide Book**
- The Guide will make the progression of this mod a lot easier.
- It contains every recipe the mod has to offer.
![Guide Book Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f94bbe13c91114aeaf5f745e11edbba8fc699ee.png)
![Guide Book UI for WoU Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6073a1cfe3de13e75b729c6ac17db719f2f2817c.png)

### Craft the **Infusing Altar**
- It's how you'll be creating everything in the mod.

![Infusing Altar Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebab3532b5fc1bf1989cdea4ed069dd93ecfe6d7.png)

Then, you will **need** to place a **heat source** above the altar for it to work.
You can use **Lava** or **Magma** for a heat source.

![The altar above Magma](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db07d3bb70a409d4a43260f83880ffbeeaa770cc.png)
![The Altar above Lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10d499cbd918ea07f2edb94e8fa149a8f653d12e.png)

### From there, you can follow the rest of the instruction in the Guide Book
#### You can also look in the gallery for other info but it showcase form.
